anomaly_summary.explanation: Events flagged as anomalous (actual > 2× predicted) indicate unusual circumstances not well-represented in training data. These become valuable 'hard cases' to include in future training iterations, progressively improving the index.

rebuild_trigger.condition: After every 100 new closed events OR weekly
rebuild_trigger.rationale: The FAISS/NN index must be rebuilt periodically to incorporate recent events. New events improve retrieval for similar future events. The monthly MAE chart proves that larger training sets produce lower errors.
